channel.title: home on chtc
channel.description: Recent content in home on chtc

item.title: tech
item.description: A list of technology stuff used by me. stuff I use computer Actually it’s a laptop not a cumputer. It’s a HP 250 G4 I think. programs and stuff OS: Fedora Workstation DE: Gnome Browser: Firefox Terminal: Foot Editor: Neovim Music Player: Rhythmbox Media Player: Mpv Shell: Zsh Image Viewer: Imv PDF Viewer: Zathura

item.title: media
item.description: List of media that I am currently consuming/planning to consume/consumed. Not everything may be listed here, because I’m too lazy to add it, don’t remember it or don’t want to add it for some reason. Stuff like anime will be on my AniList account & music will be on my Last.fm account. movies Movie Status Ginger Snaps Plan To Watch Ginger Snaps 2: Unleashed Plan To Watch Black Widow Completed Crank Completed Crank High Voltage Completed Devil’s Candy, The Completed Exte Completed Idle Hands Completed Incredibles, The Completed Incredibles 2, The Completed Loved Ones, The Completed Machine Girl Completed Scooby-Doo 2 Completed Sharknado 21 Completed shows Show Episode Season Status Mr.

item.title: GLOBAL FANDEMIC (Split Set)
item.description: The Machine Girl A2B2 Night Of Fire set, split by me (in opus). GLOBAL FANDEMIC DOWNLOAD details Split with FFmpeg, Python and stolen code from Stack Exchange. making of the cover art Downloaded 2 frames (the one with the global fandemic text and one before that) with youtube-dl and FFmpeg (obviously by getting the solution from the internet). Removed most of the background from the frame with the text by using remove.
